{{CargoRelic
|name=Terracotta Warrior
|class_id=21606
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|birthday=12-16
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.11%), Wishing (0.41%)
|description=On Dec 16, 210 BC, the First Emperor's mausoleum was sealed, and this terracotta was buried for over 2,000 years.<br>The Terracotta Warriors consist of soldiers and officers. One notable example is this 1.8 meter-tall soldier, whose muscular body is clad in armor and pointy combat boots. The soldier's hair is tied into a bun, and he holds a halberd with his eyes wide open and lips sealed in a serious expression. The Terracotta Warriors are a real masterpiece in the history of sculpture.
[Basic Information]
Grade: Key cultural relics
Value: World cultural heritage
Honor: Wonder of the world
Site of Excavation: Xi'an, Shaanxi, China
Location of Collection: Emperor Qinshihuang's Mausoleum Site Museum
|fame=108
|art=71
|fth=63
|civ=65
|tech=55
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +9<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +9
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +18<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +18
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +27<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +27
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +45<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +45
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +63<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +63
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +90<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +90
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +90<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +90<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, Snail DEF +600
|skill2=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, 2x B-tad Drops +15%
|skill3=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, Zombie Cells gained +30%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Legacy of Emperor Qin|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|FAME Master Scroll, +40|orange}}
|3name=Infantryman Figurine|3rec=77.48M|3atk=229190|3defense=152901|3hp=13503651|3weak=30423
|4name=Kneeling Archer Figurine|4rec=101.93M|4atk=280753|4defense=187302|4hp=19065648|4weak=34818
|5name=Chariot Soldier Figurine|5rec=130.85M|5atk=341738|5defense=227987|5hp=26466847|5weak=39303
|6name=Officer Figurine|6rec=163.09M|6atk=409743|6defense=273356|6hp=36239037|6weak=45642
|Arec=200.34M|Aatk=488289|Adefense=325757|Ahp=48178350|Aweak=52051
}}}}
